data.content:
Larry Bird
Larry Bird was an iconic NBA player known for his exceptional skills and contributions to basketball.

NBA
The NBA is the National Basketball Association, a professional basketball league in North America where Larry Bird played.

Fly Me to the Moon
Fly Me to the Moon is a well-known song originally composed by Bart Howard, frequently performed and recorded by numerous artists including Frank Sinatra.

Person
The song Fly Me to the Moon is explicitly stated as one of the speaker's favourite songs, indicating a personal emotional or aesthetic connection.

Basketball
Basketball is a team sport played between two teams of five players each, involving scoring points by shooting a ball through a hoop.

L. Kornet
L. Kornet is a professional basketball player recognized as one of the best players for the Celtics.

Celtics
The Celtics is a professional basketball team in the NBA, for which L. Kornet plays.<SEP>The Celtics is a professional basketball team and the user's favorite team.

Boston Celtics
The Boston Celtics is a professional basketball team in the NBA, commonly referred to as the Celtics.<SEP>The Boston Celtics is a professional basketball team that won the game by 20 points.<SEP>The Boston Celtics is a professional basketball team based in Boston, Massachusetts.

Elden Ring
Elden Ring is a critically acclaimed video game recognized as one of the best games in the last 15 years.

Movies
Movies are audiovisual works intended for entertainment, typically shown in theaters or on digital platforms.

Game
The Game is a basketball match in which the Boston Celtics achieved a 20-point victory.

20 Points
20 Points is the margin of victory by which the Boston Celtics won the game.

Boston
Boston is a major city in the U.S. state of Massachusetts and the home city of the Boston Celtics.
